accountFeatures.title: Build Your Future With Buildex
accountFeatures.subtitle: Create an account to access exclusive features and manage your projects easily.

itemOne.title: Manage Your Projects
itemOne.subtitle: Organize and track all your construction projects in one place.

itemTwo.title: Get Custom Quotes
itemTwo.subtitle: Request and save custom quotes for your upcoming projects.

itemThree.title: Project Updates
itemThree.subtitle: Receive real-time updates and important notifications about your projects.

itemFour.title: Team Collaboration
itemFour.subtitle: Invite your team members and collaborate seamlessly on projects.
